cenas.dalle_prompt: A grand, celebratory montage of all the best moments from the course: the first sit, the first successful recall, the funniest trick, the most helpful task. Epic, emotional music. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A fast-paced, heartwarming recap of the entire journey, from a clumsy puppy to a master-level companion.

cenas.dalle_prompt: A beautiful, animated certificate of completion for "AdaptaCão - Nível Mestre". A gold medal with a paw print swings into view. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The certificate and medal animate with regal, celebratory effects. The user's name could be notionally written on it.

cenas.dalle_prompt: A dog is wearing a small, cute graduation cap. The owner is giving it a big hug. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: An emotional, close-up shot capturing the bond and pride between the dog and owner.

cenas.dalle_prompt: A wall of fame, showing photos of many different dogs of all breeds and sizes, all looking happy and well-trained. The community of AdaptaCão graduates. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The camera pans across the diverse wall of graduates, creating a sense of community and shared success.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final, epic shot of the AdaptaCão logo with the text "PARABÉNS! Você e seu cão são uma dupla de MESTRES!". Confetti falls in the background. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A grand, final, celebratory screen. The confetti animation is slow and majestic. The text is bold and powerful.
